w11339ab1c23c15c15c27c27b7.ParameterLogi.Docs: A label for a parameter. The label defines a friendly name or description that the CloudFormation console shows on the **Specify Parameters** page when a stack is created or updated. The `ParameterLogicalID` key must be the case-sensitive logical ID of a valid parameter that has been declared in the `Parameters` section of the template.
